description.ko: 대칭과 수학적 파괴가 만나는 완벽한 디지털 카오스 상태에 갇힌 단일 구조체입니다.
description.en: A monolithic structure caught in a state of perfect digital chaos, where symmetry meets mathematical destruction.

prompt: A brutalist #1A1A1A obsidian deity mask by KURO-X, undergoing a violent yet mathematically precise geometric deconstruction. The structure is shattering into a vortex of sharp #808080 polygonal shards and #C0C0C0 pixel-sorted fragments against a stark #FFFFFF digital vacuum. Heavy digital glitch artifacts, scanlines, and intense chromatic aberration cut through the composition. High-contrast cinematic lighting with razor-sharp ray-traced reflections on the fragmented surfaces. Unreal Engine 5 aesthetic, 8k resolution.
